title: Fix financegnome 404 — TimescaleDB on omniflow postgres
root_cause: flow-finance-ai crash-loop: TimescaleDB missing on vanilla postgres:latest; Traefik returned 404 with no healthy backend
resolution: Installed timescaledb-2-postgresql-16 in postgres container, timescaledb-tune, CREATE EXTENSION on flow_finance_ai, restarted postgres + app
operator_note: Pin omniflow postgres to timescale/timescaledb:latest-pg16 on next compose change so TimescaleDB survives image rebuilds
browser_noise: contentscript.js warnings are wallet/browser extensions — not app bugs
